text:
Thank you for reaching out to Meridian Home Services!

I'm sorry, but I wasn't able to complete your booking request for an HVAC tune-up at ZIP 22030 on January 28, 2026 (morning). No changes have been made to your account.

I'd love to help get this sorted out for you! Here are a few ways I can assist:

- **Try a different date or time** — if the morning slot isn't available, I can look into afternoon windows.
- **Check other details** — if there's anything you'd like to adjust (such as the service type or location), just let me know.

Please don't hesitate to reach out, and we'll do our best to get your HVAC tune-up scheduled! 😊
